channel.title: Pike Place Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Pike Place Events

item.title: No Strings Attached: An Improvised Puppet Show for Grownups
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

At Unexpected Productions’ Market Theater\, puppets let their hair down (or strings loose) in No Strings Attached—a hilarious\, adults improv puppet show. After a long day entertaining the kids\, these puppets are ready to play—singing bawdy songs\, cracking jokes\, and getting up to all kinds of outrageous fun. And the best part? You call the shots with your suggestions! \nDon’t miss this one-of-a-kind comedy show at Pike Place Market. It’s puppets\, it’s improv\, and it’s guaranteed to make you laugh. \nTHIS SHOW CONTAINS MATURE CONTENT\, LANGUAGE\, AND SITUATIONS

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: West Coast Grill & BBQ Sauces Class
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Atrium Kitchen, 93 Pike St, Seattle, WA 98101

A delicious walk through the four styles of American barbecue sauces from Kansas City , Memphis , Texas, and North Carolina . Sweet & sour too spicy, too tangy, too sweet, each sauce represents the region, along with the traditional meats from each locale. To go with the cooking class is an introduction to Chef Traci’s West Coast Grill . This 90-minute class is the perfect way to hone your sauce skills, learn new sauces, and spice up your grilling techniques. Please note: pork and beef are the primary proteins for this class. This is the perfect holiday gift for your favorite grill master! Buy Tickets

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: Improv Happy Hour
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions, 1428 Post Alley

Join us for Improv Happy Hour—where comedy is unscripted, unpredictable, and unbelievably fun! From movie mashups to literary spoofs and bold, experimental comedy, our quick-thinking performers turn your suggestions into hilarious scenes on the spot. This family-friendly show at the iconic Gum Wall in Pike Place Market guarantees a night of laughter, surprises, and improv magic you won’t forget. Bring your wildest ideas, your loudest laughs, and get ready for a one-of-a-kind comedy experience—because at Improv Happy Hour, anything can happen (and usually does)! Buy Tickets

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: Taste of Improv - Improv Open Mic Georgetown Art Attack
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Seattle Improv School\, 5700 6th Ave S\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Whether you’re a student\, a pro\, or just checking out the Art Attack\, this is your chance to take the stage\, make bold choices\, and have a blast doing it.\n\nJoin Unexpected Productions Improv School as we join Georgetown’s ART ATTACK with a spontaneous showcase of improv talent. Bring your squad\, support each other\, and celebrate the joy of live\, unfiltered performance.\nHit the Georgetown Art Attack\, then head over to the Improv School.\nCome for the art. Stay for the improv. See you there!

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Seattle Suites: An Improvised Neil Simon Comedy
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Improvised comedy in the style of Neil Simon\, where one hotel suite becomes a comedic pressure cooker for 3 hilarious improvised tales One hotel suite. Countless misunderstandings. Relentless laughs. Seattle Suite is a laugh-driven\, fully improvised play inspired by the style of Plaza Suite and California Suite\, capturing the signature humor of Neil Simon that is fast\, verbal\, and rooted in beautifully human flaws. Each night\, a single Seattle hotel room becomes the setting for interconnected scenes inspired by your suggestions\, friends overshare and spiral\, romantic gestures go wrong\, awkward silences stretch\, and small problems become big ones. The comedy comes from character and relationship\, building through sharp dialogue\, escalating tension\, and recognizable\, lived-in situations. Perfect for fans of smart comedy\, relationship humor\, and classic theatrical wit.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Seattle Theatresports 2026
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 9:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Seattle’s high-energy improv battle where your suggestions shape every scene. Fast\, funny\, unpredictable comedy Fri. & Sat. 9:30 Welcome to Seattle’s funnest improv comedy show\, a high-energy\, no-rules showdown where your ideas shape every scene. Seattle Theatresports at Unexpected Productions’ Market Theater in Pike Place Market is part comedy battle\, part game night\, and completely powered by the crowd. Boo the judges. Cheer the Gum Wall race and laugh til it hurts! Every show\, two teams of top Seattle improvisers go head to head\, performing games\, stories\, characters\, and scenes inspired entirely by your suggestions. Judges score the rounds\, decide the winners\, and shape the fun (as we boo them). No scripts. No safety nets. Just fast thinking\, bold choices\, and pure creative mayhem. This isn’t your parents’ improv show\, unless your parents were super cool.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Unexpected Productions: Seattle Theatresports Improv
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 9:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions, 1428 Post Alley

Fridays & Saturdays from 9:30pm - 11pm Seattle’s high-energy improv battle where your suggestions shape every scene. Fast, funny, unpredictable comedy Fri. & Sat. 9:30 Welcome to Seattle’s funnest improv comedy show, a high-energy, no-rules showdown where your ideas shape every scene. Seattle Theatresports at Unexpected Productions’ Market Theater in Pike Place Market is part comedy battle, part game night, and completely powered by the crowd. Boo the judges. Cheer the Gum Wall race and laugh til it hurts! Every show, two teams of top Seattle improvisers go head to head, performing games, stories, characters, and scenes inspired entirely by your suggestions. Judges score the rounds, decide the winners, and shape the fun (as we boo them). No scripts. No safety nets. Just fast thinking, bold choices, and pure creative mayhem. This isn’t your parents’ improv show, unless your parents were super cool. Buy Tickets

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: The Original Food and Culture Tour of Pike Place Market
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Pike Place Market

VOTED 10 BEST FOOD TOURS IN THE COUNTRY BY USA TODAY! Join Savor Seattle for Seattle’s original food and cultural tour of Pike Place Market! On their signature tour, they will take you on a journey through the lively and bustling days in the heart of Seattle: Pike Place Market. While their guides give you the most delicious tastings at eight different partners. You’ll also learn the history of the Market and hear the stories of the small-batch food and craft producers that make this place one of Seattle’s most beloved landmarks. Find out why fish fly, why a pig is our mascot, how the “Original” Starbucks was founded, how an alleyway became covered in gum, what made Pike Place Market one of Anthony Bourdain’s favorite places, and many more pieces of info Seattle Savor guides we’ll be thrilled to share with you while you savor culinary offerings. Once you’re done, you’ll be equipped and ready to dive deeper into the historic neighborhood. Tours are available daily, starting at 10am and 2

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: Market to Table Tour & Cooking Class
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Atrium Kitchen, 93 Pike St, Seattle, WA 98101

“We wish we did this at the beginning of our trip!” “You’ve exceeded all of our expectations! And then some!!!” … These are some of the frequent comments we receive during our Market to Table experience!   Reserve Your Spot! Each experience INCLUDES: • 90-120 minutes VIP TOUR of Pike Place Market, visiting Chef Traci’s favorite spots, and includes some delightful sips and nibbles • 60-90 minute HANDS-ON cooking class (but if you want to sit and watch, you can do that too!) • 30-60 minute LUNCH or DINNER • All welcome nibbles, appetizers, non alcoholic beverages, tastes & sips along the tour, all ingredients for a customized cooking class • Estimate 3-4 hours for the complete experience • All class menus are created at the start of class and take into consideration individual dietary preferences and allergies (please note: the kitchen is not a gluten-free, nut-free facility, however menus may be customized to omit nuts, gluten, and/or dairy) The Market to Table tour and cooking cla

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: Improv Happy Hour
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions, 1428 Post Alley

Join us for Improv Happy Hour—where comedy is unscripted, unpredictable, and unbelievably fun! From movie mashups to literary spoofs and bold, experimental comedy, our quick-thinking performers turn your suggestions into hilarious scenes on the spot. This family-friendly show at the iconic Gum Wall in Pike Place Market guarantees a night of laughter, surprises, and improv magic you won’t forget. Bring your wildest ideas, your loudest laughs, and get ready for a one-of-a-kind comedy experience—because at Improv Happy Hour, anything can happen (and usually does)! Buy Tickets

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: Show Your Game: An Improvised Game Show
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions, 1428 Post Alley

Sundays in March! A Comedy Game Show About Ridiculously Specific Expertise. Everyone is secretly an expert at something. In Show Your Game , professional improvisers and fearless audience volunteers step into the worlds of real-life experts and attempt to survive challenges designed by those experts. Expect strange trivia, impossible tasks, wildly specific knowledge, and the kind of confidence that only comes from being completely wrong in public. Maybe it’s acupuncture. Maybe it’s panic packing. Maybe it’s Gilmore Girls . Maybe it’s finding creative new places to lose your keys. Inspired by the chaotic brilliance of Taskmaster , the clever curiosity of QI , and the unpredictable madness of Game Changer , every show is completely improvised and completely different. Past topics have included haunting, bubbles, bedtime routines, public art, computer programming, low-income housing, tabletop RPG streaming, Veggie Tales, housesitting disasters, and one unforgettable investigation into a s

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: Show Your Game: An Improvised Game Show
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Ever wonder what secret skills your neighbors are hiding? That quiet person next to you on the bus might be a brain surgeon\, a barbecue champion\, or the only parent in town who can get their toddler to nap on time. Show Your Game is here to celebrate those everyday experts and unexpected talents! \nEach night\, a hilarious mix of improvisers and brave audience members go head-to-head\, diving deep into the worlds of two surprising experts. They’ll tackle quirky questions and wild challenges\, each crafted by the experts themselves to test just how much our contestants really know. \nLove the clever chaos of QI\, the unpredictable twists of Game Changer\, or the absurd fun of Taskmaster? Then this is your kind of show. \nSo\, when it’s your turn to step into someone else’s world… are you ready to Show Your Game?

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: The Production: An Improvised Mockumentary
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions, 1428 Post Alley

Sundays at 7pm Every week, a brand-new workplace. A fresh batch of quirky coworkers. And—worst of all—a different boss. Step inside the chaos of an unpredictable workday as the Unexpected Productions cast improvises an all-new, on-the-spot mockumentary. From the office know-it-all to the slacker skating by, you'll meet the characters you love to hate—and hate to admit you recognize. No script, no second takes—just pure, unscripted workplace mayhem. Buy Tickets

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: No Strings Attached: An Improvised Puppet Show for Grownups
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions, 1428 Post Alley

Sundays at 7pm At Unexpected Productions’ Market Theater , puppets let their hair down (or strings loose) in No Strings Attached —a hilarious, adults improv puppet show. After a long day entertaining the kids, these puppets are ready to play—singing bawdy songs, cracking jokes, and getting up to all kinds of outrageous fun. And the best part? You call the shots with your suggestions! Don’t miss this one-of-a-kind comedy show at Pike Place Market. It’s puppets, it’s improv, and it’s guaranteed to make you laugh. THIS SHOW CONTAINS MATURE CONTENT, LANGUAGE, AND SITUATIONS Buy Tickets

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: The Original Food and Culture Tour of Pike Place Market
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Pike Place Market

VOTED 10 BEST FOOD TOURS IN THE COUNTRY BY USA TODAY! Join Savor Seattle for Seattle’s original food and cultural tour of Pike Place Market! On their signature tour, they will take you on a journey through the lively and bustling days in the heart of Seattle: Pike Place Market. While their guides give you the most delicious tastings at eight different partners. You’ll also learn the history of the Market and hear the stories of the small-batch food and craft producers that make this place one of Seattle’s most beloved landmarks. Find out why fish fly, why a pig is our mascot, how the “Original” Starbucks was founded, how an alleyway became covered in gum, what made Pike Place Market one of Anthony Bourdain’s favorite places, and many more pieces of info Seattle Savor guides we’ll be thrilled to share with you while you savor culinary offerings. Once you’re done, you’ll be equipped and ready to dive deeper into the historic neighborhood. Tours are available daily, starting at 10am and 2

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

And then some!!!” … These are some of the frequent comments we receive during our Market to Table experience!   Reserve Your Spot! Each experience INCLUDES: • 90-120 minutes VIP TOUR of Pike Place Market, visiting Chef Traci’s favorite spots, and includes some delightful sips and nibbles • 60-90 minute HANDS-ON cooking class (but if you want to sit and watch, you can do that too!) • 30-60 minute LUNCH or DINNER • All welcome nibbles, appetizers, non alcoholic beverages, tastes & sips along the tour, all ingredients for a customized cooking class • Estimate 3-4 hours for the complete experience • All class menus are created at the start of class and take into consideration individual dietary preferences and allergies (please note: the kitchen is not a gluten-free, nut-free facility, however menus may be customized to omit nuts, gluten, and/or dairy) The Market to Table tour and cooking cla

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: NOCHE DE IMPROV EN ESPAÑOL
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions Improv School ISSAQUAH/EASTSIDE\, 1315 NW Mall Street\, Suite 4\, Issaquah\, WA\, 98108\, United States

Noche de Improvisación en español\, es una noche de jam para los que hablan FLUIDAMENTE español\, que ya sean estudiantes actuales de UP\, exalumnos de UP\, miembros del conjunto y exalumnos\, para jugar juntos y seguir desarrollando sus habilidades de improvisación en español. Noche de Improvisación en español \, está dirigida por Laila Valencia. Los juegos ayudan a los improvisadores a desarrollar habilidades\, desarrollar confianza y fomentar la creatividad. Pero lo mas importante es … ¡es en español y es DIVERTIDO! El espacio es limitado a 16 personas. Fecha y hora: El tercer lunes de cada mes\, de 7 a 9 p. m. Ubicación: 650 S Orcas Suite 101\, Seattle\, WA 98108 Precio: $10 (11.24 con cargos) El Requisito Previo: Unexpected Productions Improv 100 Laila Valencia Nació en Guadalajara Jalisco México finales de los años 70as\, donde vivió toda su infancia y adolescencia\, siempre tuvo interés por las artes escénicas y participó en varios proyectos de teatro y danza contemporanea en la UDG \, a finales de los 90tas\, Se va a vivir a Seattle WA donde conoce la técnica de comedia en improvisación \, de la cual se enamora se inscribe en clases y talleres especializados\,con maestros como Keith Johnstone creador de Theatresports\, Gorilla and Maestro improv shows\, Randy Dixon director artistico de Unexpected Produccions desde hace 20 anos\, talleres con Gary Austin\, Asiste a retiros de improvisacion en Nueva York con artistic new direcctins y desde entonces a participado en 6 festivales internacionales de improvisación\,A Impartido clases para toda las edades\, ahora es miembro de de la compañía más antigua de improvisacionnen Seattle Unexpected Productions\, en la cual continúa su preparación y actúa dos o mas veces por semana \, siempre está trabajando en proyectos diferentes\, forma larga y corta de improv\, contando historias que se inspiradan con las ideas del público.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: The Original Food and Culture Tour of Pike Place Market
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Pike Place Market

VOTED 10 BEST FOOD TOURS IN THE COUNTRY BY USA TODAY! Join Savor Seattle for Seattle’s original food and cultural tour of Pike Place Market! On their signature tour, they will take you on a journey through the lively and bustling days in the heart of Seattle: Pike Place Market. While their guides give you the most delicious tastings at eight different partners. You’ll also learn the history of the Market and hear the stories of the small-batch food and craft producers that make this place one of Seattle’s most beloved landmarks. Find out why fish fly, why a pig is our mascot, how the “Original” Starbucks was founded, how an alleyway became covered in gum, what made Pike Place Market one of Anthony Bourdain’s favorite places, and many more pieces of info Seattle Savor guides we’ll be thrilled to share with you while you savor culinary offerings. Once you’re done, you’ll be equipped and ready to dive deeper into the historic neighborhood. Tours are available daily, starting at 10am and 2

From Pike Place Market Events

Event details

item.title: 700 Level Student Showcase
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Witness the creation of believable characters\, inspiring scenes\, and some improv magic by 700 level class.\n\n\n\nJoin the advanced students in our 700 class and witness them blossom with new improv skills. Under the guidance of our expert improv teachers\, 700 students are learning new narrative formats and enhancing their skills by working in an ensemble. You get to see the fruits of their efforts by witnessing the creation of believable characters\, inspiring scenes\, and some improv magic.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Duo Comedy Showcase 2026
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Seattle’s one and only open mic dedicated to two-person improv teams! Every week at Unexpected Productions\, two-person teams take the stage to create hilarious\, fast-paced\, totally unscripted comedy right before your eyes. No scripts\, no safety nets—just pure improv magic. \nAt Duos\, everyone shines. Newer performers sharpen their game. Seasoned improvisers experiment\, take risks\, and get wonderfully weird. The results? Quick-witted scenes\, surprising twists\, and bold choices that feel impossible until you watch them happen live. \nWhether you dream of being the next Key & Peele\, Tina Fey & Amy Poehler\, or a chaotic tag-team like Deadpool & Wolverine\, this is your chance to take the mic and run with it. All experience levels are welcome. Bring a friend\, form a team\, and give Seattle a show they won’t forget. To sign up your duo\, email duoshowcase@gmail.com. \nLooking for a midweek serotonin boost? Watching the show is just as fun as performing in it. Grab a seat\, grab a friend\, and discover why Unexpected Productions is the home of Seattle improv.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Loose Cannons 2026
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Loose Cannons is Seattle improv at its most unpredictable. Every performance at Unexpected Productions in Pike Place Market is a one-of-a-kind experience: exciting\, unexpected\, a little dangerous\, and always ridiculously fun. This is the show where anything can happen and usually does. \nPart One: Part One: The night kicks off with a unique performance\, setting the performers in a new format with special guest improvisers showcasing their signature style or a never-before-seen format. Your suggestions fuel the fire\, and the improvisers will ignite the stage\, bringing your ideas to life. \nPart Two: The second half launches from a single audience suggestion\, setting the performers in motion. It might start with a song\, a monologue\, or a rapid-fire group connection game. Whatever emerges will inspire spontaneous stories\, surprising twists\, and big comedic swings. \nLoose Cannons is fueled by audience ideas\, fearless performers\, and the thrill of not knowing what happens next. You light the fuse. They run with it. What they create is entirely up to you.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Seattle Suites: An Improvised Neil Simon Comedy
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Improvised comedy in the style of Neil Simon\, where one hotel suite becomes a comedic pressure cooker for 3 hilarious improvised tales One hotel suite. Countless misunderstandings. Relentless laughs. Seattle Suite is a laugh-driven\, fully improvised play inspired by the style of Plaza Suite and California Suite\, capturing the signature humor of Neil Simon that is fast\, verbal\, and rooted in beautifully human flaws. Each night\, a single Seattle hotel room becomes the setting for interconnected scenes inspired by your suggestions\, friends overshare and spiral\, romantic gestures go wrong\, awkward silences stretch\, and small problems become big ones. The comedy comes from character and relationship\, building through sharp dialogue\, escalating tension\, and recognizable\, lived-in situations. Perfect for fans of smart comedy\, relationship humor\, and classic theatrical wit.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Seattle Theatresports 2026
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 9:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Seattle’s high-energy improv battle where your suggestions shape every scene. Fast\, funny\, unpredictable comedy Fri. & Sat. 9:30 Welcome to Seattle’s funnest improv comedy show\, a high-energy\, no-rules showdown where your ideas shape every scene. Seattle Theatresports at Unexpected Productions’ Market Theater in Pike Place Market is part comedy battle\, part game night\, and completely powered by the crowd. Boo the judges. Cheer the Gum Wall race and laugh til it hurts! Every show\, two teams of top Seattle improvisers go head to head\, performing games\, stories\, characters\, and scenes inspired entirely by your suggestions. Judges score the rounds\, decide the winners\, and shape the fun (as we boo them). No scripts. No safety nets. Just fast thinking\, bold choices\, and pure creative mayhem. This isn’t your parents’ improv show\, unless your parents were super cool.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: IMPROV 100 SATURDAYS- Intro to Improv: Say Yes!\, SPRING'26
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions Improv School ISSAQUAH/EASTSIDE\, 1315 NW Mall Street\, Suite 4\, Issaquah\, WA\, 98108\, United States

Discover Unexpected Productions’ philosophy of improvisation\, developed over our 43 years of improvising in Seattle! You’ll learn how to actively listen\, to use your own life to create collaborative stories\, and you’ll work on the fundamental principles of improvisation: what it means to say\, “Yes\, And”\, how to tell stories that include everyone in the room\, how to stop worrying about failing\, and the games and concepts behind what we do on stages around the world! Under the guidance of one of our best Seattle improv teachers\, you will learn to:· Be a Better Listener Conquer Fears Spark Creativity Meet New People & Make New Friends Become a Better Problem Solver Gain Confidence· Fail With Grace (and Maybe Even Enjoy It) Say Yes More in Your Life Get Out of Your Comfort Zone Become a Better Public Speaker Discover More About Yourself …and have a blast doing it! Time and Dates: Saturdays for eight (8) weeks\, from March 21 to May 9\, 12pm to 2:30pm. NOTE: Attendance at the first session of your course is mandatory as it sets the agenda for the entire quarter. If you think you will have to miss the first class\, please consider registering for the next quarter. No Prerequisites. All students begin at this level\, even those with existing improv experience. It’s a prerequisite to the other levels. Location: 650 S Orcas St\, Room 217\, Seattle\, WA\, 98108 (In Georgetown\, south of downtown\, with plenty of parking.) Maximum Students: 16 Cost: Ticket price $295.00 Age: 18 and above **Cancellation policy: If you must cancel before the first class\, we can only offer credit towards the same level class next quarter. We are unable to offer refunds. If you cancel after the first class we cannot offer credit towards a future class. Again\, we are unable to offer refunds.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Improv Happy Hour
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Our quick-thinking performers turn your suggestions into hilarious scenes on the spot\, from movie mashups to literary spoofs and bold\, experimental comedy\, our quick-thinking performers turn. This family-friendly show at the iconic Gum Wall in Pike Place Market guarantees a night of laughter\, surprises\, and improv magic you won’t forget. Bring your wildest ideas\, your loudest laughs\, and get ready for a one-of-a-kind comedy experience—because at Improv Happy Hour\, anything can happen (and usually does)!

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

Improvised comedy in the style of Neil Simon\, where one hotel suite becomes a comedic pressure cooker for 3 hilarious improvised tales One hotel suite. Countless misunderstandings. Relentless laughs. Seattle Suite is a laugh-driven\, fully improvised play inspired by the style of Plaza Suite and California Suite\, capturing the signature humor of Neil Simon that is fast\, verbal\, and rooted in beautifully human flaws. Each night\, a single Seattle hotel room becomes the setting for interconnected scenes inspired by your suggestions\, friends overshare and spiral\, romantic gestures go wrong\, awkward silences stretch\, and small problems become big ones. The comedy comes from character and relationship\, building through sharp dialogue\, escalating tension\, and recognizable\, lived-in situations. Perfect for fans of smart comedy\, relationship humor\, and classic theatrical wit.

Seattle’s high-energy improv battle where your suggestions shape every scene. Fast\, funny\, unpredictable comedy Fri. & Sat. 9:30 Welcome to Seattle’s funnest improv comedy show\, a high-energy\, no-rules showdown where your ideas shape every scene. Seattle Theatresports at Unexpected Productions’ Market Theater in Pike Place Market is part comedy battle\, part game night\, and completely powered by the crowd. Boo the judges. Cheer the Gum Wall race and laugh til it hurts! Every show\, two teams of top Seattle improvisers go head to head\, performing games\, stories\, characters\, and scenes inspired entirely by your suggestions. Judges score the rounds\, decide the winners\, and shape the fun (as we boo them). No scripts. No safety nets. Just fast thinking\, bold choices\, and pure creative mayhem. This isn’t your parents’ improv show\, unless your parents were super cool.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: IMPROV 100 SUNDAYS 3:30 pm- Intro to Improv: Say Yes!\, SPRING'26
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions Improv School ISSAQUAH/EASTSIDE\, 1315 NW Mall Street\, Suite 4\, Issaquah\, WA\, 98108\, United States

Discover Unexpected Productions’ philosophy of improvisation\, developed over our 43 years of improvising in Seattle! You’ll learn how to actively listen\, to use your own life to create collaborative stories\, and you’ll work on the fundamental principles of improvisation: what it means to say\, “Yes\, And”\, how to tell stories that include everyone in the room\, how to stop worrying about failing\, and the games and concepts behind what we do on stages around the world! Under the guidance of one of our best Seattle improv teachers\, you will learn to:· Be a Better Listener Conquer Fears Spark Creativity Meet New People & Make New Friends Become a Better Problem Solver Gain Confidence· Fail With Grace (and Maybe Even Enjoy It) Say Yes More in Your Life Get Out of Your Comfort Zone Become a Better Public Speaker Discover More About Yourself …and have a blast doing it! Time and Dates: Sundays for eight (8) weeks\, from March 22 to May 27\, 3:30pm to 6:00pm (No class on April 5th) NOTE: Attendance at the first session of your course is mandatory as it sets the agenda for the entire quarter. If you think you will have to miss the first class\, please consider registering for the next quarter. No Prerequisites. All students begin at this level\, even those with existing improv experience. It’s a prerequisite to the other levels. Location: 5700 6th Ave St\, Suite 109\, Umbrella Room\, Seattle\, WA 98108 (In Georgetown\, south of downtown\, with plenty of parking.) Maximum Students: 16 Cost: Ticket price $295.00 Age: 18 and above **Cancellation policy: If you must cancel before the first class\, we can only offer credit towards the same level class next quarter. We are unable to offer refunds. If you cancel after the first class we cannot offer credit towards a future class. Again\, we are unable to offer refunds.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Show Your Game: An Improvised Game Show
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Ever wonder what secret skills your neighbors are hiding? That quiet person next to you on the bus might be a brain surgeon\, a barbecue champion\, or the only parent in town who can get their toddler to nap on time. Show Your Game is here to celebrate those everyday experts and unexpected talents! \nEach night\, a hilarious mix of improvisers and brave audience members go head-to-head\, diving deep into the worlds of two surprising experts. They’ll tackle quirky questions and wild challenges\, each crafted by the experts themselves to test just how much our contestants really know. \nLove the clever chaos of QI\, the unpredictable twists of Game Changer\, or the absurd fun of Taskmaster? Then this is your kind of show. \nSo\, when it’s your turn to step into someone else’s world… are you ready to Show Your Game?

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: IMPROV 100 MONDAYS- Intro to Improv: Say Yes!\, SPRING'26
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions Improv School ISSAQUAH/EASTSIDE\, 1315 NW Mall Street\, Suite 4\, Issaquah\, WA\, 98108\, United States

Discover Unexpected Productions’ philosophy of improvisation\, developed over our 43 years of improvising in Seattle! You’ll learn how to actively listen\, to use your own life to create collaborative stories\, and you’ll work on the fundamental principles of improvisation: what it means to say\, “Yes\, And”\, how to tell stories that include everyone in the room\, how to stop worrying about failing\, and the games and concepts behind what we do on stages around the world! Under the guidance of one of our best Seattle improv teachers\, you will learn to:· Be a Better Listener Conquer Fears Spark Creativity Meet New People & Make New Friends Become a Better Problem Solver Gain Confidence· Fail With Grace (and Maybe Even Enjoy It) Say Yes More in Your Life Get Out of Your Comfort Zone Become a Better Public Speaker Discover More About Yourself …and have a blast doing it! Time and Dates: Mondays for eight (8) weeks\, from March 23 to May 21\, 12pm to 3:30pm NOTE: Attendance at the first session of your course is mandatory as it sets the agenda for the entire quarter. If you think you will have to miss the first class\, please consider registering for the next quarter. No Prerequisites. All students begin at this level\, even those with existing improv experience. It’s a prerequisite to the other levels. Location: 5700 6th Ave St\, Suite 109\, Umbrella Room\, Seattle\, WA 98108 (In Georgetown\, south of downtown\, with plenty of parking.) Maximum Students: 16 Cost: Ticket price $295.00 Age: 18 and above **Cancellation policy: If you must cancel before the first class\, we can only offer credit towards the same level class next quarter. We are unable to offer refunds. If you cancel after the first class we cannot offer credit towards a future class. Again\, we are unable to offer refunds.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: IMPROV 100 TUESDAYS - Intro to Improv: Say Yes!\, SPRING'26
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions Improv School ISSAQUAH/EASTSIDE\, 1315 NW Mall Street\, Suite 4\, Issaquah\, WA\, 98108\, United States

Say yes! Learn to listen\, connect\, play and use your own life to create stories with others! An 8 week intro to improvised theatre! Discover Unexpected Productions’ philosophy of improvisation\, developed over our 43 years of improvising in Seattle! You’ll learn how to actively listen\, to use your own life to create collaborative stories\, and you’ll work on the fundamental principles of improvisation: what it means to say\, “Yes\, And”\, how to tell stories that include everyone in the room\, how to stop worrying about failing\, and the games and concepts behind what we do on stages around the world! Under the guidance of one of our best Seattle improv teachers\, you will learn to:· Be a Better Listener Conquer Fears Spark Creativity Meet New People & Make New Friends Become a Better Problem Solver Gain Confidence· Fail With Grace (and Maybe Even Enjoy It) Say Yes More in Your Life Get Out of Your Comfort Zone Become a Better Public Speaker Discover More About Yourself …and have a blast doing it! Time and Dates: Tuesdays for eight (8) weeks\, from March 24 to May 22\, 7pm to 9:30pm NOTE: Attendance at the first session of your course is mandatory as it sets the agenda for the entire quarter. If you think you will have to miss the first class\, please consider registering for the next quarter. No Prerequisites. All students begin at this level\, even those with existing improv experience. It’s a prerequisite to the other levels. Location: 5700 6th Ave St\, Suite 109\, Umbrella Room\, Seattle\, WA 98108 (In Georgetown\, south of downtown\, with plenty of parking.) Maximum Students: 16 Cost: Ticket price $295.00 Age: 18 and above **Cancellation policy: If you must cancel before the first class\, we can only offer credit towards the same level class next quarter. We are unable to offer refunds. If you cancel after the first class we cannot offer credit towards a future class. Again\, we are unable to offer refunds.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: 700 Level Student Showcase
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Witness the creation of believable characters\, inspiring scenes\, and some improv magic by 700 level class.\n\n\n\nJoin the advanced students in our 700 class and witness them blossom with new improv skills. Under the guidance of our expert improv teachers\, 700 students are learning new narrative formats and enhancing their skills by working in an ensemble. You get to see the fruits of their efforts by witnessing the creation of believable characters\, inspiring scenes\, and some improv magic.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: IMPROV 100 WEDNESDAYS - Intro to Improv: Say Yes!\, SPRING'26
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions Improv School ISSAQUAH/EASTSIDE\, 1315 NW Mall Street\, Suite 4\, Issaquah\, WA\, 98108\, United States

You are registered. Welcome! Thank you for registering for this eight-week course at Unexpected Productions Improv. We’re excited to have you join us. Please read the details below carefully. This information is important. Time and Dates: Wednesdays for eight (8) weeks\, from March 25 to May 23\, 7pm to 9:30pm Important Attendance Note Attendance at the first session is mandatory\, as it sets the agenda for the entire quarter. If you think you may miss the first class\, we strongly recommend registering for the next quarter instead. Location: 5700 6th Ave St\, Suite 109\, Umbrella Room\, Seattle\, WA 98108 Class Details • Maximum Students: 16 • Cost: $295 • Age Requirement: 18+ Cancellation Policy If you must cancel before the first class\, we can offer credit toward the same level class next quarter. We are unable to offer refunds. If you cancel after the first class\, we cannot issue credit for a future class and cannot offer refunds. If you have questions before the first class\, please contact us at school@unexpectedproductions.org We look forward to working with you and can’t wait to get started. Improv classes are physically active and often involve movement\, standing\, and high-energy exercises\, so staying hydrated is important. We recommend the following: • Comfortable clothing that allows for easy movement • Comfortable shoes\, as you will likely be standing and moving for extended periods • A notebook and pen\, if you would like to take notes on techniques or exercises • A water bottle (some locations do not have water fountains) • A “Yes\, And” attitude. A willingness to participate\, take risks\, and be brave is the most important thing to bring

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Duo Comedy Showcase 2026
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Seattle’s one and only open mic dedicated to two-person improv teams! Every week at Unexpected Productions\, two-person teams take the stage to create hilarious\, fast-paced\, totally unscripted comedy right before your eyes. No scripts\, no safety nets—just pure improv magic. \nAt Duos\, everyone shines. Newer performers sharpen their game. Seasoned improvisers experiment\, take risks\, and get wonderfully weird. The results? Quick-witted scenes\, surprising twists\, and bold choices that feel impossible until you watch them happen live. \nWhether you dream of being the next Key & Peele\, Tina Fey & Amy Poehler\, or a chaotic tag-team like Deadpool & Wolverine\, this is your chance to take the mic and run with it. All experience levels are welcome. Bring a friend\, form a team\, and give Seattle a show they won’t forget. To sign up your duo\, email duoshowcase@gmail.com. \nLooking for a midweek serotonin boost? Watching the show is just as fun as performing in it. Grab a seat\, grab a friend\, and discover why Unexpected Productions is the home of Seattle improv.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: IMPROV 100 THURSDAYS- Intro to Improv: Say Yes!\, SPRING'26
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions Improv School ISSAQUAH/EASTSIDE\, 1315 NW Mall Street\, Suite 4\, Issaquah\, WA\, 98108\, United States

Discover Unexpected Productions’ philosophy of improvisation\, developed over our 43 years of improvising in Seattle! You’ll learn how to actively listen\, to use your own life to create collaborative stories\, and you’ll work on the fundamental principles of improvisation: what it means to say\, “Yes\, And”\, how to tell stories that include everyone in the room\, how to stop worrying about failing\, and the games and concepts behind what we do on stages around the world! Under the guidance of one of our best Seattle improv teachers\, you will learn to:· Be a Better Listener Conquer Fears Spark Creativity Meet New People & Make New Friends Become a Better Problem Solver Gain Confidence· Fail With Grace (and Maybe Even Enjoy It) Say Yes More in Your Life Get Out of Your Comfort Zone Become a Better Public Speaker Discover More About Yourself …and have a blast doing it! Time and Dates: Thursdays for eight (8) weeks\, from March 26 to May 24\, 7pm to 9:30pm NOTE: Attendance at the first session of your course is mandatory as it sets the agenda for the entire quarter. If you think you will have to miss the first class\, please consider registering for the next quarter. No Prerequisites. All students begin at this level\, even those with existing improv experience. It’s a prerequisite to the other levels. Location: 5700 6th Ave St\, Suite 109\, Umbrella Room\, Seattle\, WA 98108 (In Georgetown\, south of downtown\, with plenty of parking.) Maximum Students: 16 Cost: Ticket price $295.00 Age: 18 and above **Cancellation policy: If you must cancel before the first class\, we can only offer credit towards the same level class next quarter. We are unable to offer refunds. If you cancel after the first class we cannot offer credit towards a future class. Again\, we are unable to offer refunds.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Loose Cannons 2026
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Loose Cannons is Seattle improv at its most unpredictable. Every performance at Unexpected Productions in Pike Place Market is a one-of-a-kind experience: exciting\, unexpected\, a little dangerous\, and always ridiculously fun. This is the show where anything can happen and usually does. \nPart One: Part One: The night kicks off with a unique performance\, setting the performers in a new format with special guest improvisers showcasing their signature style or a never-before-seen format. Your suggestions fuel the fire\, and the improvisers will ignite the stage\, bringing your ideas to life. \nPart Two: The second half launches from a single audience suggestion\, setting the performers in motion. It might start with a song\, a monologue\, or a rapid-fire group connection game. Whatever emerges will inspire spontaneous stories\, surprising twists\, and big comedic swings. \nLoose Cannons is fueled by audience ideas\, fearless performers\, and the thrill of not knowing what happens next. You light the fuse. They run with it. What they create is entirely up to you.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Seattle Suites: An Improvised Neil Simon Comedy
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Improvised comedy in the style of Neil Simon\, where one hotel suite becomes a comedic pressure cooker for 3 hilarious improvised tales One hotel suite. Countless misunderstandings. Relentless laughs. Seattle Suite is a laugh-driven\, fully improvised play inspired by the style of Plaza Suite and California Suite\, capturing the signature humor of Neil Simon that is fast\, verbal\, and rooted in beautifully human flaws. Each night\, a single Seattle hotel room becomes the setting for interconnected scenes inspired by your suggestions\, friends overshare and spiral\, romantic gestures go wrong\, awkward silences stretch\, and small problems become big ones. The comedy comes from character and relationship\, building through sharp dialogue\, escalating tension\, and recognizable\, lived-in situations. Perfect for fans of smart comedy\, relationship humor\, and classic theatrical wit.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Seattle Theatresports 2026
item.description:
Friday, March 27, 2026 at 9:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Seattle’s high-energy improv battle where your suggestions shape every scene. Fast\, funny\, unpredictable comedy Fri. & Sat. 9:30 Welcome to Seattle’s funnest improv comedy show\, a high-energy\, no-rules showdown where your ideas shape every scene. Seattle Theatresports at Unexpected Productions’ Market Theater in Pike Place Market is part comedy battle\, part game night\, and completely powered by the crowd. Boo the judges. Cheer the Gum Wall race and laugh til it hurts! Every show\, two teams of top Seattle improvisers go head to head\, performing games\, stories\, characters\, and scenes inspired entirely by your suggestions. Judges score the rounds\, decide the winners\, and shape the fun (as we boo them). No scripts. No safety nets. Just fast thinking\, bold choices\, and pure creative mayhem. This isn’t your parents’ improv show\, unless your parents were super cool.

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Improv Happy Hour
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Our quick-thinking performers turn your suggestions into hilarious scenes on the spot\, from movie mashups to literary spoofs and bold\, experimental comedy\, our quick-thinking performers turn. This family-friendly show at the iconic Gum Wall in Pike Place Market guarantees a night of laughter\, surprises\, and improv magic you won’t forget. Bring your wildest ideas\, your loudest laughs\, and get ready for a one-of-a-kind comedy experience—because at Improv Happy Hour\, anything can happen (and usually does)!

From Unexpected Productions

Event details

item.title: Seattle Suites: An Improvised Neil Simon Comedy
item.description:
Saturday, March 28, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Unexpected Productions\, 1428 Post Alley at the Gum Wall in Pike Place Market\, Seattle\, WA\, 98101\, United States

Improvised comedy in the style of Neil Simon\, where one hotel suite becomes a comedic pressure cooker for 3 hilarious improvised tales One hotel suite. Countless misunderstandings. Relentless laughs. Seattle Suite is a laugh-driven\, fully improvised play inspired by the style of Plaza Suite and California Suite\, capturing the signature humor of Neil Simon that is fast\, verbal\, and rooted in beautifully human flaws. Each night\, a single Seattle hotel room becomes the setting for interconnected scenes inspired by your suggestions\, friends overshare and spiral\, romantic gestures go wrong\, awkward silences stretch\, and small problems become big ones. The comedy comes from character and relationship\, building through sharp dialogue\, escalating tension\, and recognizable\, lived-in situations. Perfect for fans of smart comedy\, relationship humor\, and classic theatrical wit.

From Unexpected Productions

Ever wonder what secret skills your neighbors are hiding? That quiet person next to you on the bus might be a brain surgeon\, a barbecue champion\, or the only parent in town who can get their toddler to nap on time. Show Your Game is here to celebrate those everyday experts and unexpected talents! \nEach night\, a hilarious mix of improvisers and brave audience members go head-to-head\, diving deep into the worlds of two surprising experts. They’ll tackle quirky questions and wild challenges\, each crafted by the experts themselves to test just how much our contestants really know. \nLove the clever chaos of QI\, the unpredictable twists of Game Changer\, or the absurd fun of Taskmaster? Then this is your kind of show. \nSo\, when it’s your turn to step into someone else’s world… are you ready to Show Your Game?
